transcript.text: I turned 35 on Saturday, so we had a little birthday get together.
Hopefully it was good celebrations, and hopefully you're still hungover this morning.
I'm feeling good today, so that's something.
So trying to get stuff over the line here, and still juggling between you guys and Mosul, And...
Frankly, like, Mosul is just a lot less expensive.
Yes, that's always, that's their calling card.
Yep, but to be honest, like, one of the things that I think you guys should talk more about when you're comparing the two is the sheer lack of APIs.
On the Mosul or public APIs or such, on the Mosul side is a pretty big, like, for me, issue.
But, you know, talking to the finance folks, they definitely like the price of Mosul a bit more.
And so really trying to get to, like, can you guys get a little better on the pricing on yours?
And so where we're at right now is we're pretty much already at 50 users, but we're not at 50 devices yet because a lot of folks are BYOD right now and they need to get that addressed.
But we're expected to ramp up to about 110 by the of the year.
Um, that's, that's kind of where the projections are, but I know you guys like how your licensing works.
It's 25 packs after the fact and, and all of that.
And I can't get them to, to really push for more seats, but I was wondering if we could come to a price that would actually work, um, for all of us.
What is Mosul, like, what's the number that they're showing you for how many seats or devices?
Yeah, I mean, their pricing is pretty cheap.
They don't have the same vulnerability stuff that you guys have, but, you know, there are six, sorry, three dollars a unit a month.
You guys are coming in at eight dollars a year in a month, right?
Now, I'm looking at what you guys provided for quotes, and give me one second.
And, you know, basically I'm trying to get to bottom dollar pricing on this.
So you guys came in at, you know.
So 75 Macs, 35% off, which is what I sent, amounts to, I believe, $682 per Mac per month.
Yeah, so that's just on the base involved.
We're trying to get down to, give me one second.
Let me just do the quick map on this.
And my apologies for not having this in front of me already.
Yeah, we'd ideally like to get down to like 115.
I think that's the high ball of time.
Nope, but it's definitely not that right.
Sorry, ideally we'd like to get down to 75 per month, or sorry, per, combined per device per year, right?
And I know that's a stretch, because right now you guys are at, on the 75 devices, you guys are at 81.90.
And so, how close can you get me?
And again, that's on 50 devices, but knowing full well that it's going to be closer to 110 by any.
I just can't buy 110 right now.
What is the list on both?
So it's 8 and 250, so that's 1050 times 50 seats.
Oh, no, that's the wrong way.
Okay, so that's roughly 40% off 50 devices.
What I'm doing is I'm punching in numbers to see how many people the approval pipeline needs to get.
Go through, because I kind of know who is amenable to what, at what level.
So if it was 40% off, that's $37.80 out the door.
Let's just give it a go.
Let me just see if I can run this through and get it approved.
If we can get you done at whatever that was, $75.60 per unit each year, it'd be $37.80 out the door for MDM and phone on 50 devices.
Is that where we could move forward?
I think that would be good.
What I'm going to do is...
I need you to, so in the group chat, there is the signatory and finance stuff.
I'm assuming we're too small to do MSA Redlines and things like that?
Unfortunately, yes, but I do have two...
I have two pre-approved, well, wait, wait, wait, I don't want to say two.
I think it might just be one at this level.
There's one pre-approved clause I can add to an order form, and that is use of company name in marketing without prior written permission.
So use of name, throw that in.
Yep, so we definitely want that.
We also want to turn off auto-renew.
Just because that's something we want as standard on our contracts.
And then the venue on everything is preferable to either California or Delaware.
So if you're one of those two, or we can get one of those two pretty easily, then that'll make this really simple.
What do you mean by the venue?
So, like, it's the governing laws, or, you know, if we have to go to either binding arbitration or litigation, then it's, yeah, that stuff.
I didn't check your MSA to see what it actually is.
California is great, so we're good with California.
That's one piece of the MSA I was not aware of, so I'm learning every day.
I've been here two and a half years, I'm still learning.
Preference number three is anywhere but Texas that's equally painful for all of us.
In the chat, I gave you signatory and billing contacts.
I should still be the contact you should work with on this, though.
But if you could update, you know, if you can get those.
Proved and get me updated POs, or sorry, get me an updated quote on the 50, as well as a Word doc version of your MSA, so that I can send it to the lawyers for review.
So a couple things I need to do here.
The device count locks me from preventing auto-renew, so I will need to run through legal and ask if they can approve that on this project here.
I might need to jump through a hoop or two.
I don't see any problems with it.
If I have any problem, like turning it on or off, rather, I will let you know.
I will run the pricing through our approval pipeline.
Okay, again, I'll let you know if I run into any problems.
I will send over the MSA to you.
It is up on our site, but if you want a Word doc, I will need to attach that.
And just so your legal team is aware, yeah, legal won't accept a redlining process on a 50 MAC plan, so you're aware.
So the best we can really do is hopefully auto-renew and definitely the use of name requiring consent.
I know deals the size, that's kind of typical.
So we've still got to run up on them and see what they say or flag, and we'll go from there.
I'm hoping, you know, if we can get this, if you can get that over to me quickly, that, you know, maybe as early as like end of week, maybe early next week, we should be able to get to something.
So that's where I'm trying to get to.
I will put a tentative contract start for the 15.
So typically how we have folks sign is, you know, I will, once it's approved, like I've been attaching PDFs up to this point so far.
When someone, when we come to an agreement on the price point and all like legal stuff is thrown in, I actually will send a link that your signer will visit and they'll sign through DealHub.
And so that's where billing info gets entered and all that good stuff.
So right now only the CEO has signatory approval to actually sign anything.
We're hoping to get that resolved at the next board meetings.
But as of right now, he's at refiners.
And so, you know, that's why I put his contact info on it and things like that.
And if we could pre-populate as much of that other stuff in there as possible for him, that would be appreciated.
Actually, I can fill that out.
I just visit the deal room myself, plug it in, and then I submit, and it will be locked after that, but saved.
I'm basically just going to need to know address.
I don't – no, I'm 99.9% sure that's not in the – if I need it, I'll ask about that.
Yeah, if you need that or Don's number, just give me a shout.
Oh, and sorry, one last thing.
Net 30, I think, if we – I don't know what your – That's standard for us.
Finance may ask as well, like billing structure on a 50-Mac plan.
We offer like annual upfront, so it'd a lump sum.
Yeah, I it would be expected.
I'll confirm that with our folks.
Sorry, the amount you just gave me was 76 or 75?

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Negotiate pricing and terms for Kandji MDM services for GrowthX AI.](https://fathom.video/share/-6QmFRH43Tya5XV7X-sZHnTE421h6-vK?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX AI considering Kandji vs. Mosul for MDM, with Kandji offering better APIs but higher pricing](https://fathom.video/share/-6QmFRH43Tya5XV7X-sZHnTE421h6-vK?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [Kandji agreed to reduce pricing to $75.60/device/year for 50 devices ($37.80 total/month)](https://fathom.video/share/-6QmFRH43Tya5XV7X-sZHnTE421h6-vK?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [GrowthX AI requested specific contract terms: no auto-renewal, California venue, and restricted use of company name](https://fathom.video/share/-6QmFRH43Tya5XV7X-sZHnTE421h6-vK?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)

## Topics

### Current and Projected Device Count

  - [Currently at 50 users, not all on company devices (some BYOD)](https://fathom.video/share/-6QmFRH43Tya5XV7X-sZHnTE421h6-vK?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [Projecting growth to 110 devices by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/-6QmFRH43Tya5XV7X-sZHnTE421h6-vK?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [Kandji licensing works in 25-device packs after initial purchase](https://fathom.video/share/-6QmFRH43Tya5XV7X-sZHnTE421h6-vK?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)

### Pricing Negotiation

  - [Mosul offering $3/unit/month](https://fathom.video/share/-6QmFRH43Tya5XV7X-sZHnTE421h6-vK?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [Kandji's initial quote: $8/device/month ($81.90/device/year for 75 devices)](https://fathom.video/share/-6QmFRH43Tya5XV7X-sZHnTE421h6-vK?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [GrowthX AI target: $75/device/year](https://fathom.video/share/-6QmFRH43Tya5XV7X-sZHnTE421h6-vK?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [Final agreed price: $75.60/device/year ($37.80/month for 50 devices)](https://fathom.video/share/-6QmFRH43Tya5XV7X-sZHnTE421h6-vK?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [40% discount applied to reach this price point](https://fathom.video/share/-6QmFRH43Tya5XV7X-sZHnTE421h6-vK?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)

### Contract Terms and Requirements

  - [GrowthX AI requests:](https://fathom.video/share/-6QmFRH43Tya5XV7X-sZHnTE421h6-vK?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
    1.  No auto-renewal clause (Kandji needs approval)
    2.  Restricted use of company name in marketing (pre-approved clause available)
    3.  California or Delaware as governing law venue (California confirmed in Kandji's MSA)
  - [Kandji unable to accept redlines for 50-device plan](https://fathom.video/share/-6QmFRH43Tya5XV7X-sZHnTE421h6-vK?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
  - [Net 30 payment terms confirmed as standard](https://fathom.video/share/-6QmFRH43Tya5XV7X-sZHnTE421h6-vK?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
  - [Annual upfront billing structure expected](https://fathom.video/share/-6QmFRH43Tya5XV7X-sZHnTE421h6-vK?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Signing Process

  - [Kandji to send link for electronic signing through DealHub](https://fathom.video/share/-6QmFRH43Tya5XV7X-sZHnTE421h6-vK?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
  - [Only GrowthX AI's CEO currently has signatory approval](https://fathom.video/share/-6QmFRH43Tya5XV7X-sZHnTE421h6-vK?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
  - [Kandji will pre-populate billing info in the deal room](https://fathom.video/share/-6QmFRH43Tya5XV7X-sZHnTE421h6-vK?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kandji to seek approval for disabling auto-renewal](https://fathom.video/share/-6QmFRH43Tya5XV7X-sZHnTE421h6-vK?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [Kandji to run final pricing through approval pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/-6QmFRH43Tya5XV7X-sZHnTE421h6-vK?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Kandji to send updated quote for 50 devices](https://fathom.video/share/-6QmFRH43Tya5XV7X-sZHnTE421h6-vK?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
  - [Kandji to provide Word doc version of MSA for legal review](https://fathom.video/share/-6QmFRH43Tya5XV7X-sZHnTE421h6-vK?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
  - [GrowthX AI to review MSA with legal team](https://fathom.video/share/-6QmFRH43Tya5XV7X-sZHnTE421h6-vK?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Tentative contract start date set for April 15th (next Tuesday)](https://fathom.video/share/-6QmFRH43Tya5XV7X-sZHnTE421h6-vK?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
  - [GrowthX AI to confirm annual upfront billing structure internally](https://fathom.video/share/-6QmFRH43Tya5XV7X-sZHnTE421h6-vK?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Aim to finalize deal by end of week or early next week](https://fathom.video/share/-6QmFRH43Tya5XV7X-sZHnTE421h6-vK?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)

action_items.description: Run 40% off pricing ($75.60/unit/year) through approval pipeline for 50 devices
Update quote for 50 devices at $75.60/unit/year ($37.80 total/month)
Send Word doc version of MSA to Yousef
Check w/ legal re turning off auto-renew for 50-device contract
Fill out billing info in deal room (address, billing email)
Confirm annual upfront billing structure w/ finance team
